verse_text: Then Pilate said to them, 'You take Him and judge Him according to your law.'

links.context: Paul's trial here is strikingly unusual in that there are no actual charges against him, yet there is already an appeal. As Festus would look incompetent sending a man to Caesar on appeal without any charges, this hearing has to be held in order to come up with a legal accusation (compare [[JOH.18:29]]-35).
While living under Gentile dominion, the Jews had to ask permission of the king to enforce their own laws with regard to putting someone to death (see [[JOH.18:31]]).
